privileged_info_for_vlm: Original portfolio: 'My Portfolio'. New portfolio: 'Tech Portfolio'. Stocks to move to 'Tech Portfolio': MSFT (50 units at 374.5) and NVDA (25 units at 615.3). Stock to keep in 'My Portfolio': AAPL (100 units at 185.2). 'My Portfolio' must only contain AAPL at the end.
